rules.rule: every temporal continuity scan MUST cite source_evidence_id and an ordered list of frame_indices.
frame_index sequences MUST be strictly increasing; gaps are reported and BLOCK procedural-sequence promotion.
frames cited by candidates MUST exist in the decomposition; missing frames BLOCK approval.
scene boundaries MUST be reviewer-declared; autonomous scene detection is FORBIDDEN.
procedural sequences extracted from video MUST have contiguous frame coverage; non-contiguous procedural sequences BLOCK approval (fail-closed).
orphan frames (referenced by no candidate) are reported but NON-blocking unless the reviewer flags them.
